collapsible.description: Whether an accordion item can be closed after it has been expanded.

defaultValue.description: The initial value of the expanded accordion items when uncontrolled.

disabled.description: Whether the accordion items are disabled.

id.description: The unique identifier of the accordion.

ids.description: The ids of the elements in the accordion. Useful for composition.

multiple.description: Whether multiple accordion items can be expanded at the same time.

orientation.description: The orientation of the accordion items.

value.description: The controlled value of the expanded accordion items.
The accordion machine returned by useAccordion().
The value of the accordion item.

disabled.description: Whether the accordion item is disabled.
